title: The long way into York
caption: A quiet arrival beneath a sky that could not decide whether to behave.

title: Stone, ivy, afternoon
caption: The sort of lane that makes a person walk slower without announcing why.

title: Coffee before weather
caption: A small table, a strong cup, and fifteen optimistic minutes without rain.

quote: Some days the itinerary is merely a rumor.

title: Window seat
caption: A moving landscape and the deeply British confidence of a paper cup of tea.

title: Market day
caption: Flowers, old stone, and enough baked goods to complicate lunch.
